subject: A green humanoid figure with an armored or carapaced body crouches in a fighting stance surrounded by green energy
description: A green-skinned humanoid figure with a distinctly armored or shell-like body structure stands in a low combat-ready crouch. The figure's build is broad-shouldered and compact, with visible ridged or scaled features on the outer form — suggesting a carapaced or chitinous exoskeleton rather than bare skin. Green energy radiates outward from the figure's body. Tropical or foliage-like shapes appear in the background suggesting an outdoor setting with vegetation, rendered in a bright green palette. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure positioned in the lower center, crouched low.
foreground: green carapaced humanoid in low combat crouch, energy radiating outward
background: bright green energy and tropical foliage shapes
emotion: coiled aggression — low stance, ready to strike
